name: RIC Interest-Related and Short-Term Capital Gain Dividend Exclusion

eligibility.description: Applies to dividends designated by the RIC as interest-related or short-term capital gain dividends, subject to certain CFC and related-party exceptions.

description: Exempts foreign corporations from the 30% tax on interest-related dividends and short-term capital gain dividends received from a Regulated Investment Company (RIC).
